description:
Create a 'Retrospective Template' tiddler with the following text body:

! What went well
* 

! What could be improved
* 

! Action Items
* 

Create a 'Retrospective Dashboard' tiddler featuring a button labeled 'Start New Retrospective'. This button must generate a new tiddler titled 'Sprint Retrospective - YYYY-MM-DD' (using the current date in YYYY-0MM-0DD format), tagged with 'Meeting' and 'Retrospective', which inherits the content of the 'Retrospective Template'. Use the dashboard to generate and save today's retrospective tiddler.
